briefdescription.para: Allocate event-channel between caller and remote domain.

parameterdescription.para: local event channel port on success

memberdef.argsstring: (domid_t remote_dom, evtchn_port_t remote_port, evtchn_cb_t cb, void *data)
memberdef.name: bind_interdomain_event_channel

briefdescription.para: Allocate local event channel, binded to remote port and attach specified callback to it.

parameterdescription.para: remote domain event channel port number
private data, that will be passed to cb
local event channel port on success

briefdescription.para: Bind user-defined handler to specified event-channel.

parameterdescription.para: private data, that will be passed to handler as parameter

briefdescription.para: Unbind handler from event channel, substitute it with empty callback.
Check if missed events are present on specified port.
Disable event processing on specified port.
Enable event processing on specified port.
Clear event channel from pending events.
Initialize Xen event channel driver, used on initialization.

detaileddescription.para: This file provides the interface for managing Xen event channels, including allocation, binding, and callback management.
